# tcg-sandbox_lore_post (Resource)

Manages a lore post in a TCG Sandbox game.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `content` (String) The markdown content of the lore post. This is a write-only field; the API does not return it.
- `game_id` (String) The ID of the game this lore post belongs to.
- `title` (String) The title of the lore post.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the lore post.
